tr.td: Acute non-ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Amlodipine (as amlodipine besylate) 2.5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (2.5 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Metformin hydrochloride 500 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms per spray, use 1 spray under the tongue as needed for chest pain, may repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
1 tablet (81 mg) by mouth once daily
Atorvastatin (as atorvastatin calcium) 40 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (40 mg) by mouth once daily
Prasugrel (as prasugrel hydrochloride) 10 mg oral tablet
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
Transfusion of packed red blood cells
Development of individualized plan of care

ul.li: Achieve and maintain LDL cholesterol below 1.8 mmol/L
Achieve and maintain total cholesterol below 4.0 mmol/L
Achieve and maintain triglycerides below 1.7 mmol/L
Achieve and maintain HDL cholesterol above 1.0 mmol/L
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modification
Reduce body weight by at least 5% from baseline through diet and exercise
Limit sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams per day
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic activity per week
Maintain or achieve HbA1c at individualized target to optimize glycemic control and reduce risk of complications.
Maintain blood pressure below recommended threshold to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Maintain LDL cholesterol below recommended threshold to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Achieve and maintain healthy body weight as part of diabetes self-management.
Maintain fasting blood glucose within individualized target range.

tr.td: Vaccine product containing only Influenza virus antigen (medicinal product)
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Acute non-ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
